function.message: I can’t complete this deletion request as written because I found a canonical record for Reading Spine but no canonical project record for BlueMesa Quotebook to compare start dates against. Please clarify which existing project folder represents BlueMesa Quotebook (or create it first), then I can determine which started earlier and delete the correct one.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow (lowest inbox file, verify against canonical lanes), deletion-and-wiping workflow (do not delete without uniquely supported target), and 40_projects rule that README.MD is canonical project reference.
function.outcome_justification: The task requires comparing two projects’ start points before deletion. Canonical evidence exists for Reading Spine (40_projects/2026_05_03_reading_spine/README.MD), but no canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project record was found in the projects lane, so the delete target is not uniquely supported.
